meaning: Royal Corps of Transport (英国)皇家运输部队
examples: An RCT study to evaluate a targeted, theory driven healthy eating leaflet.
Methods: a randomized double-blind controlled clinical trial (RCT) was conducted.
Oral amoxicillin for 5 days was as effective as intramuscular ceftriaxone for 2 days (1 RCT).
Another important element of a high-quality RCT is the random assignment of patients to treatment groups.
Denbighshire council had the highest rate at 60.5%, and Rhondda Cynon Taf council (RCT) had the lowest rate with 44%.
